I read the prompt and prior log as a proposal record, not as proof. The prompt fixes the syntax: distinguished sigma,tau, implicit tame relation tau^sigma = tau^2, later generators in the pro-2 core, and exponents reduced modulo M=85667662080.The prior log convincingly eliminates the early scalar and fixed-П„вҲ’2 candidates; the only live word is the dynamic tame-inertia candidate from Turns 9вҖ“31.This fits the known landscape: the JannsenвҖ“Wingberg local presentation method is formation-theoretic over tame subextensions, while the dyadic K=Q2 case is the exceptional missing case in this exact style of presentation.Numdam+1

The live candidate remains:variables sigma,tau,x,y definitions nx = (x*tau^50932630783)^40491355905 ny = (y*tau)^40491355905 relations x*sigma^45176306175*x*sigma^40491355905*x^-1*nx*ny^sigma*y^-1

Equivalently, with ПҖ=ПҖ2вҲҲZ and О·=2ПҖ on prime-to-2 tame inertia,r=xПғвҲ’ПҖxПғПҖxвҲ’1(xП„вҲ’О·)ПҖ ((yП„)ПҖ)ПғyвҲ’1,where ПҖвүЎ40491355905,вҲ’ПҖвүЎ45176306175,вҲ’О·=вҲ’2ПҖ вүЎ50932630783(modM).The new contribution this turn is an audit-and-repair of Turn 31вҖҷs two most dangerous displayed formulas, followed by a corrected uniform abelianization computation. Turn 31вҖҷs conclusions are mostly salvageable, but two fractions were printed in the wrong direction.

First, for a norm wordNa (u)=(uП„a)ПҖ on the sign double cover, let t be the deck involution and let a nontrivial tame-inertia character satisfy П„вҶҰОұоҖ =1. The Fox coefficient is the completed geometric sumDa=j=0вҲ‘ПҖвҲ’1(tОұa)j.

The correct identity isDa=1вҲ’tОұa 1вҲ’(tОұa)ПҖ=1вҲ’tОұa1вҲ’t,because ПҖвүЎ1(mod2) and ПҖвүЎ0(mode), so (tОұa)ПҖ=t. This is the opposite of the formula displayed in Turn 31вҖҷs main text. With the corrected formula, the proof still works: 1вҲ’tОұa is a unit for ОұaоҖ =1, while 1вҲ’t is radical. Hence Da is radical, and the coefficient fromxвҲ’1(xП„вҲ’О·)ПҖ is вҲ’1+DвҲ’О·, a unit. So nontrivial tame-inertia character blocks still contribute no 2-primary Smith torsion.Second, in the trivial tame-inertia block, the mod-2 relation is(1+TвҲ’s)X+(1+T)Y=0,sвүЎПҖ(modf).

If f=2a m with m odd, then sвүЎ1(mod2a) and sвүЎ0(modm). For even f, s is odd, so 1+TвҲЈ1+TвҲ’s. Therefore the legitimate elimination is

Y=Q(T)X+YЛү,Q(T)=1+T1+TвҲ’s,not the reciprocal. With this corrected Q, the reduced multiplier remains h(T)=1+Q(T)+Q(TвҲ’1).

For a nontrivial f-th root О¶,(1+О¶)h(О¶)=О¶вҲ’s+О¶s+1.

Thus h(О¶)=0 would force О¶2s+1=1. But 2s+1 is odd and congruent to 1(modm), hence gcd(f,2s+1)=1. So no nontrivial О¶ is a zero, and h(1)=1. The earlier nonsingularity conclusion survives, but the quotient direction must be fixed in any final proof.Here is the corrected uniform abelianization computation.LetО”e,f=вҹЁПғЛү,П„ЛүвҲЈП„Лүe=1,ПғЛүf=1,ПғЛүП„ЛүПғЛүвҲ’1=П„Лү2вҹ©,eВ odd,В eвҲЈ2fвҲ’1.

Let Ue,f be the pro-2 kernel above this tame quotient. PutО»=eвҲ’1j=0вҲ‘eвҲ’1П„ЛүjвҲҲZ2[О”e,f],the idempotent for the tame-inertia-invariant part, and let S=Пғf be the marked unramified pro-2 generator. Abelianizing the orbit of the candidate relation gives the single Z2[О”e,f]-module relation(ПғЛүвҲ’s+О»)X+(О»ПғЛүвҲ’1)Y=0,sвүЎПҖ(modf).

On the (1вҲ’О»)-part, this becomesПғЛүвҲ’s XвҲ’Y=0,so it contributes a free Z2 -module of rank (eвҲ’1)f and no torsion.

On the О»-part, it becomes the unramified cyclic relation(1+TвҲ’s)X+(TвҲ’1)Y=0overZ2 [T]/(TfвҲ’1).The TвҲ’1 incidence part gives fвҲ’1 unit Smith pivots. After those are removed, the remaining cycle-sum relation is2i=0вҲ‘fвҲ’1Xi=0.

Thus the О»-part contributesZ2fвҠ•C2.Adding the marked free generator S gives the corrected uniform abelianization:Ue,fabвү…Z2ef+1вҠ•C2.This matches the local-class-field-theoretic benchmark for a tame degree-ef extension of Q2: one valuation generator, ef principal-unit directions, and only Ој2 -torsion before adjoining i. LabuteвҖҷs local-field DemuЕЎkin framework is the relevant comparison point for this pro-2 kernel analysis.Cambridge University Press & Assessment So Turn 31вҖҷs new abelianization claim is correct, but only after repairing both direction errors. The candidate is still not proved. The later prior turns were right that DemuЕЎkin type, abelianization, cup product, sign kernel, and cyclotomic branch behavior do not automatically determine the full filtered (Пғ,П„)-operator action. The final missing ingredient remains a dyadic formation/rigidity theorem identifying the exact action selected by the word, includingПғПҖ=ПғsS (1вҲ’s)/f in finite unramified quotients and the dynamic tame correction П„вҲ’2ПҖ, with the actual arithmetic Frobenius/tame-inertia action.

ESTABLISHED: The live dynamic candidate remains unrefuted. I corrected two inverted formulas from the prior log:Da=1вҲ’tОұa1вҲ’t for nontrivial tame-character sign-cover blocks, and

Q(T)=1+T1+TвҲ’s for the trivial tame-inertia elimination. With those corrections, the uniform finite-tame abelianization proof is valid:Ue,fabвү…Z2ef+1вҠ•C2.

GAP: This is still not a complete presentation proof. The missing step is the dyadic formation/rigidity theorem: proving that the candidateвҖҷs exact filtered Пғ,П„-operator action on every finite-tame DemuЕЎkin kernel is the arithmetic action, not merely that the kernels have the correct abelian, cup-product, and cyclotomic invariants.

NEXT: Work with the exact marked operator package(Ue,f,ПҮ,S,ПғПҖ,П„вҲ’2ПҖ)and compare it against explicit arithmetic Kummer/Witt data in small mixed tame cases, especially (e,f)=(3,2) and (5,4), at the level of U/U5, where the filtered-action ambiguity becomes visible.[BREAKTHROUGH]
